summary: WarehouseDraftPage UI redesign testing completed successfully. All features verified: modern card layout, stock color logic (green/red), koli orange highlight, tahmini ihtiyaç dropdown, summary cards, balance badge, cutoff alert. Backend API unchanged and working correctly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed - 10 warehouse draft + 10 rut page)

context_for_next_testing_agent: WarehouseDraftPage UI redesign fully tested. Key findings: 1) Title 'Depo Sipariş Oluştur' with subtitle showing route day. 2) Balance badge shows '12,450.00 TL' (static fallback as no real balance data). 3) Three summary cards: Rut Müşterisi (3), Sipariş Veren (0), Taslakta (3). 4) Section title 'Müşteri Siparişleri & Taslaklar'. 5) Modern product cards with: product icon, name, depot stock (blue), SKT date, plasiyer stock badge (green if >0, red if 0), total draft+order with orange koli pill, tahmini ihtiyaç dropdown. 6) Dropdown opens with quantity options and updates locally. 7) Submit button 'Depoya Sipariş Gönder' present. 8) Cutoff alert shows when after 16:30. 9) Info box explains how the system works. 10) Responsive layout works on tablet (768px). All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

ui_elements_verified.title: Depo Sipariş Oluştur - data-testid='warehouse-draft-title'
ui_elements_verified.subtitle: Çarşamba rutu için sipariş taslağı - data-testid='warehouse-draft-subtitle'

koli_highlight.styling: rounded-full bg-orange-50 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-orange-600

responsive_layout.tablet_768px: Cards stack vertically, summary cards in single column
responsive_layout.desktop_1920px: Cards in row layout, summary cards in 3 columns
